members-access-levels.png.note: Organization Settings > Members page, Team Admins section. No cursor -- read-only orientation state showing the Team Admins grouping and free-text job title chips referenced in the article.

brand-team-role-list.png.note: Brand Settings > Team & Access page, Brand Team list with a role dropdown open showing all RACI role options (No role checked, Brand Marketing Manager through VP Franchise Development). Agent-captured 2026-07-17, same route/viewport, dom-sanitize freshenDates:auto. No cursor: per screenshots/CLAUDE.md dropdown rule (cursor belongs on the trigger, never inside the open menu) and the trigger for this row is hidden behind the open menu in this crop, so cursor was omitted rather than placed on top of an option.
